title: No one in Sales will get back to me!
excerpt: I have sent three separate contact forms to sales and no one will respond. I want to set up the tool for my team to try. but customer service is seriously lacking

posts.author: adamsw3 (Wendell Adams)
posts.cookedHtml: I have sent three separate contact forms to sales and no one will respond. I want to set up the tool for my team to try. but customer service is seriously lacking

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Adam, I sent you a direct message to see if I can help.

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @adamsw3

I’m sorry to hear that you’ve had some trouble contacting our team!

Since this would be related to billing, please reach out to our support team at support@monday.com and we would be happy to continue assisting you in getting the information you need

Cheers,
Jenna

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
